requirements.text: The system shall expose contribution-related actions through a top-level navigation area.
requirements.annotation_notes: The opened Explore menu contains a Contribute column with options such as Submission Guidelines and Submit a Release, showing that contribution actions are surfaced in primary navigation.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to navigate from the main site navigation to an overview page for release submission guidelines.
The system shall provide a dedicated overview page that summarizes the rules and process for submitting releases.
requirements.annotation_notes: The page title explicitly states Overview Of Submission Guidelines For Releases and the page contains introductory guideline content.

requirements.text: The system shall organize release submission guidance into linked topic areas so users can drill down into specific rule sets.
The system shall provide a quick start guide for new contributors who are learning how to submit releases.
requirements.manual_verification_notes: the Basic Guidelines are a different tutorial than the Quick Start Guide For New Contributors, which is a linked page missing in the UI

requirements.text: The system shall support discovery of contributor documentation from an authenticated user workspace.
requirements.annotation_notes: The flow starts on a logged-in dashboard and then uses top navigation to open contribution resources, suggesting contributor help is reachable from within the user workspace.

requirements.text: The system shall provide a clear separation between learning submission rules and performing a release submission.
The system shall expose submission-related work areas such as submissions and drafts for authenticated users.
requirements.annotation_notes: The dashboard navigation includes tabs such as Submissions and Drafts, showing dedicated submission-related workspace areas.

requirements.text: The system shall provide contextual location cues on documentation pages so users can understand where they are within the help hierarchy.
requirements.annotation_notes: The guideline page shows breadcrumb-style context near the top, indicating the page's place within broader submission guidance content.

requirements.text: The system shall present submission guidance in a scannable structure that helps contributors review rules efficiently.
requirements.annotation_notes: The overview page uses section headings, bullet points, and grouped linked topics, which supports quick scanning and comprehension.

requirements.text: The system shall preserve access to broader site navigation while users are exploring contribution help resources.
requirements.annotation_notes: Both the dashboard and the guideline page retain prominent navigation or search affordances, suggesting help content remains integrated with broader site navigation rather than isolated.

requirements.text: The system shall help users continue from overview documentation into related articles when they need more detailed submission rules.
requirements.annotation_notes: The overview page includes an Articles in this section list and many topic links, which implies a broader help system designed for continued navigation into detailed guidance.
